title: [Backend] Implement Network Context Middleware
body:
## Project Context
This task is part of Phase 1: Backend Refactoring for the Stellar Insights multi-network architecture.

## Task Type
- [x] Backend
- [x] Feature

## Action Required
- [x] Create New File(s)

## File Locations
```
backend/src/middleware/network_context.rs
backend/src/main.rs
```

## Description
Create middleware that extracts and validates the X-Stellar-Network header.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Extract X-Stellar-Network header
- [ ] Validate network value
- [ ] Return 400 for invalid values
- [ ] Inject NetworkContext

## Estimated Effort
3-5 hours

title: [Backend] Separate Database Schemas for Testnet/Mainnet
body:
## Project Context
Phase 1: Backend Refactoring - Database architecture for multi-network.

## Task Type
- [x] Backend
- [x] Refactor

## File Locations
```
backend/src/database.rs
```

## Description
Implement separate SQLite databases for testnet and mainnet.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Create testnet.db and mainnet.db
- [ ] Network-specific connection pools
- [ ] Migration scripts for both

## Estimated Effort
8-12 hours
